calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-27-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-05-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause was scheduled for Court Trial Hearing on this day.
This cause was re-assigned by the PJ. for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, JPT: Sharon O'Grady, Clerk: E. Bura/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Plaintiff: Elmer Torres, in pro per, and Defendant: Oscar Gonzales, in pro per, were present.
Parties reached a settlement by Stipulation.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to move out on March 20, 2006, by 12 am. Plaintiff waives back rent and damages. Each to bear own costs and fees.
If the defendant fails to vacate, judgment for plaintiff upon a 2 day notice.
Parties agreed to terms in open court. Matter was deemed settled, and trial was vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2006 Off Calendar
